description: Comprehensive League of Legends data service providing champion analytics, summoner profiles, match history, game resources, pro player information, and esports schedules and standings.

tools.name: lol_get_champion_analysis
tools.description: Retrieve detailed champion statistics including win/pick/ban rates, optimal builds (items, runes, skills, summoner spells), counter matchups, and team synergies.

champion_name.description: The name of the League of Legends champion to analyze (e.g., 'Aatrox', 'Ahri').

lane.description: The lane position to filter analysis by (e.g., 'top', 'jungle', 'mid', 'adc', 'support').

region.description: The server region code to filter statistics by (e.g., 'kr', 'na', 'euw').

champion_name.description: The name of the analyzed champion.

win_rate.description: The champion's win rate as a percentage value.

pick_rate.description: The champion's pick rate indicating how often the champion is selected in games.

ban_rate.description: The champion's ban rate indicating how often the champion is banned in draft phase.

builds.description: List of optimal build configurations including items, runes, skill orders, and summoner spells.

counters.description: List of champions that counter this champion in lane or teamfights.

synergies.description: List of champions that synergize well with this champion in team compositions.

tools.name: lol_get_champion_synergies
tools.description: Retrieve champion synergy information showing which champions pair well together in team compositions.

champion_name.description: The name of the League of Legends champion to analyze (e.g., 'Aatrox', 'Ahri').

lane.description: The lane position to filter analysis by (e.g., 'top', 'jungle', 'mid', 'adc', 'support').

champion_name.description: The name of the analyzed champion.

synergies.description: List of champions that synergize well with this champion in team compositions.

champion.description: The name of the synergistic champion.

synergy_score.description: Numerical score indicating the strength of synergy between the two champions.

win_rate.description: The combined win rate when both champions are on the same team.

tools.name: lol_get_lane_matchup_guide
tools.description: Retrieve lane matchup guide providing win rates and difficulty ratings against enemy champions in a specific lane.

lane.description: The lane position to filter analysis by (e.g., 'top', 'jungle', 'mid', 'adc', 'support').

champion_name.description: The name of the League of Legends champion to analyze (e.g., 'Aatrox', 'Ahri').

enemy_champion.description: The name of a specific enemy champion to analyze the matchup against.

lane.description: The lane position for the matchup analysis.

champion_name.description: The name of the analyzed champion.

matchups.description: List of matchup details against enemy champions in the specified lane.

enemy_champion.description: The name of the enemy champion in the matchup.

win_rate.description: The win rate against this specific enemy champion.

difficulty.description: The difficulty rating of the matchup (e.g., 'Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard').

tools.name: lol_list_champion_details
tools.description: Retrieve detailed champion information including abilities, gameplay tips, lore, and base statistics for up to 10 champions.

champion_names.description: List of champion names to retrieve details for (maximum 10 champions).

champions.description: List of detailed champion information objects.

abilities.description: List of the champion's abilities with descriptions and stats.

tips.description: Gameplay tips for playing as or against this champion.

lore.description: The champion's background story and lore.

stats.description: Base statistics and scaling values for the champion.

tools.name: lol_list_champion_leaderboard
tools.description: Retrieve champion leaderboard rankings with win/pick/ban rates, optionally filtered by lane, region, and competitive tier.

lane.description: The lane position to filter analysis by (e.g., 'top', 'jungle', 'mid', 'adc', 'support').

region.description: The server region code to filter statistics by (e.g., 'kr', 'na', 'euw').

tier.description: The competitive tier to filter statistics by (e.g., 'challenger', 'grandmaster', 'master').

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

leaderboard.description: Ranked list of champions based on performance metrics.

rank.description: The champion's position in the leaderboard.

win_rate.description: The champion's win rate as a percentage value.

pick_rate.description: The champion's pick rate indicating how often the champion is selected in games.

ban_rate.description: The champion's ban rate indicating how often the champion is banned in draft phase.

tools.name: lol_list_champions
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all League of Legends champions with basic metadata including title, roles, and difficulty rating.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

roles.description: List of roles the champion can fulfill (e.g., 'Fighter', 'Mage', 'Assassin').

difficulty.description: Difficulty rating for playing the champion (1-10 scale).

tools.name: lol_list_lane_meta_champions
tools.description: Retrieve current meta champions for a specific lane with tier rankings, win/pick/ban rates, and KDA statistics.

lane.description: The lane position to filter analysis by (e.g., 'top', 'jungle', 'mid', 'adc', 'support').

region.description: The server region code to filter statistics by (e.g., 'kr', 'na', 'euw').

tier.description: The competitive tier to filter statistics by (e.g., 'challenger', 'grandmaster', 'master').

lane.description: The lane position for the meta analysis.

champions.description: List of meta champions for the specified lane with performance metrics.

tier.description: The meta tier ranking of the champion (e.g., 'S', 'A', 'B', 'C').

win_rate.description: The champion's win rate as a percentage value.

pick_rate.description: The champion's pick rate indicating how often the champion is selected in games.

ban_rate.description: The champion's ban rate indicating how often the champion is banned in draft phase.

kda.description: Average Kill/Death/Assist ratio for the champion in this lane.

tools.name: lol_get_summoner_game_detail
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific game including all players' champions, KDA, items, and runes.

game_id.description: The unique identifier of the game match.

region.description: The server region code where the summoner's account is registered (e.g., 'kr', 'na', 'euw').

game_id.description: The unique identifier of the game match.

players.description: List of all players in the game with their performance details.

champion.description: The champion played by this player.

kda.description: The player's Kill/Death/Assist score formatted as a string (e.g., '5/2/10').

items.description: List of items purchased by the player during the game.

runes.description: The rune configuration used by the player.

tools.name: lol_get_summoner_profile
tools.description: Retrieve summoner profile information including rank, tier, LP, win rate, and most played champions.

region.description: The server region code where the summoner's account is registered (e.g., 'kr', 'na', 'euw').

lp.description: The summoner's current League Points within their division.

win_rate.description: The summoner's overall win rate as a percentage value.

champion_pool.description: List of the summoner's most played champions with performance statistics.

games.description: Total number of games played with this champion.

win_rate.description: Win rate with this specific champion as a percentage value.

tools.name: lol_list_summoner_matches
tools.description: Retrieve recent match history for a summoner with per-game statistics including champion, result, KDA, and duration.

region.description: The server region code where the summoner's account is registered (e.g., 'kr', 'na', 'euw').

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

matches.description: List of recent matches played by the summoner.

game_id.description: The unique identifier of the game match.

champion.description: The champion played in this match.

kda.description: The player's Kill/Death/Assist score formatted as a string (e.g., '5/2/10').

created_at.description: The timestamp when the match was played in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: lol_list_discounted_skins
tools.description: Retrieve a list of currently discounted champion skins with pricing information.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

skins.description: List of currently discounted skins with pricing details.

champion.description: The champion this skin belongs to.

discount_percent.description: The discount percentage applied to the skin.

original_price.description: The original price of the skin in RP (Riot Points).

discounted_price.description: The discounted price of the skin in RP (Riot Points).

tools.name: lol_list_items
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all in-game items with metadata including name, description, cost, and stat bonuses.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

items.description: List of in-game item metadata objects.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the item.

name.description: The display name of the item.

description.description: The item's description including passive and active effects.

gold.description: The gold cost to purchase the item.

stats.description: The stat bonuses provided by the item.

tools.name: lol_get_pro_player_riot_id
tools.description: Retrieve the Riot ID and team information for a professional League of Legends player.

pro_player_name.description: The professional player's known name or gamertag (e.g., 'Faker', 'Caps').
The professional player's known name or gamertag.

riot_id.description: The player's Riot ID used for in-game identification.

team.description: The esports team the player currently belongs to.

region.description: The competitive region where the player competes.

tools.name: lol_esports_list_schedules
tools.description: Retrieve upcoming League of Legends esports match schedules with teams, leagues, and match times.

league.description: The esports league to filter schedules by (e.g., 'LCK', 'LCS', 'LEC', 'LPL').

region.description: The server region code to filter statistics by (e.g., 'kr', 'na', 'euw').

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

schedules.description: List of upcoming esports match schedules.

match_id.description: The unique identifier of the esports match.

league.description: The esports league hosting the match.

team1.description: The name of the first competing team.

team2.description: The name of the second competing team.

scheduled_time.description: The scheduled start time of the match in ISO 8601 format.

status.description: The current status of the match (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'Live', 'Completed').

tools.name: lol_esports_list_team_standings
tools.description: Retrieve team standings for a League of Legends esports league including wins, losses, and win rates.

league.description: The esports league to filter schedules by (e.g., 'LCK', 'LCS', 'LEC', 'LPL').

region.description: The server region code to filter statistics by (e.g., 'kr', 'na', 'euw').

standings.description: Ranked list of teams in the league standings.

rank.description: The team's position in the league standings.

team_name.description: The name of the esports team.

wins.description: Total number of match wins in the current season.

losses.description: Total number of match losses in the current season.

win_rate.description: The team's win rate as a percentage value.
